privileged_info_summary: The task fifo_cogs_reconciliation@1 uses the real AdventureWorks2022 SQL Server sample database as its data source. Target product is ProductID 707 (Sport-100 Helmet, Red) with verified existence in the AdventureWorks database. The task specifies Q3 2012 date range (2012-07-01 to 2012-09-30), which is verified to be within the sales data coverage of AdventureWorks2022 (confirmed to have sales data spanning 2011-2013). The task requires creation of a new schema 'Accounting' with table 'FIFOAllocation' containing columns: SalesOrderID, SalesOrderDetailID, BatchID, QtyAllocated, UnitCost. Demand data is real (from Sales.SalesOrderDetail) while supply data is synthetic (4 inventory batches created during setup). All metadata field values in task.json are accurate and consistent with task requirements and actual database structure.
